mapper.select: select (select count(1) from agent_definition) as agentCount, (select count(1) from agent_definition where status = 1) as enabledAgentCount, (select count(1) from agent_skill) as skillCount, (select count(1) from task where exec_status = 'RUNNING') as runningTaskCount, (select count(1) from task where exec_status = 'FAILED') as failedTaskCount

select t.id, ad.name as agentName, t.task_name as taskName, t.exec_status as execStatus, case t.exec_status when 'WAITING' then '等待执行' when 'RUNNING' then '执行中' when 'SUCCESS' then '执行成功' when 'FAILED' then '执行失败' else t.exec_status end as execStatusLabel, t.failure_reason as failureReason, t.update_time as updateTime from task t inner join agent_definition ad on ad.id = t.agent_id order by t.update_time desc nulls last, t.create_time desc nulls last limit #{size}
